title: [WIP] Set up staging system for documentation
body:
Thanks for asking me to work on this. I will get started on it and keep this PR's description up to date as I form a plan and make progress.

> Please look at https://github.com/mattleibow/GitHubStagingPages/blob/main/GITHUB_PAGES_SETUP.md 
> 
> And the repo workflows in  https://github.com/mattleibow/GitHubStagingPages
> 
> We need to set up a staging system here. Look how we do docs now and move us to a place where we can have a main and a staging system. 
> 
> Please check every file and think deeply before you start.


<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

💡 You can make Copilot smarter by setting up custom instructions, customizing its development environment and configuring Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Learn more [Copilot coding agent tips](https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips) in the docs.
